headline: Diamondback Energy Float Expands As Valuation Gap Draws Investor Focus
summary: Diamondback Energy's largest shareholder has completed a secondary public offering of 11 million shares of NasdaqGS:FANG. The deal, valued at about US$1.9b, expanded the public float without Diamondback issuing new shares. The transaction follows the company's US$26b Endeavor Energy acquisition and recent leadership transition. Diamondback Energy focuses on oil and gas production in the Permian Basin, one of the most active energy regions in the United States. After acquiring Endeavor...
